targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      p.name AS provider,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                                                                
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "last week",                                                                                                                                                                                        
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                     
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "previous week",                                                                                                                                         
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                    
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "2 weeks ago"                                                                                                                                           
  FROM api_provider p                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
      AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  LEFT JOIN (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
      SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_runtimejob                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  ) rj ON rj.job_id = j.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
  GROUP BY p.name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  ORDER BY "last week" ASC NULLS FIRST;

SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS "jobs with runtime",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN rj.job_id IS NULL THEN 1 END)     AS "jobs without runtime"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_runtimejob
) rj ON rj.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "jobs with runtime" ASC;
